title: aeschynanthus hartleyi
intro: Aeschynanthus hartleyi, commonly known as the Hartley's Moustache Flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, cough, and sore throat. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus hartleyi include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help in reducing swelling, fighting infections, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Aeschynanthus hartleyi are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
